title: stylisma pickeringii var. pickeringii
intro: Stylisma pickeringii var. pickeringii, also known as Pickering's Stylisma, is a perennial herb that belongs to the morning glory family (Convolvulaceae). It is native to the southeastern United States and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as aiding in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds. Stylisma pickeringii var. pickeringii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
